'''Evac pods''' were large, armed variants of [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] that served as troop landers during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]. Numerous evac pods were carried aboard the ''[[Invincible (Stark Hyperspace War)|Invincible]] ''and other ships of Ranulph Tarkin's fleet.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 37|''Star Wars'' (1998) 37]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
*[[Star Wars (1998) 38|''Star Wars'' (1998) 38]] {{Flash}}
